agent.name: Function Agent Generator
agent.description: Automatically generates JSON agent manifests for Python scripts in the Functions directory, checking for existing agents to avoid duplicates
agent.author: AI Toolbox

capabilities.description: Generate standardized JSON agent manifests for Python functions
Check for existing agents to prevent duplicates using AI-powered matching
Analyze Python scripts to extract function signatures and documentation

tools.description: Scan Functions directory and generate agent manifests for all Python scripts

function.name: generate_agents_for_functions
function.description: Automatically create JSON agents for new Python functions while avoiding duplicates

force_regenerate.description: Force regeneration of all agents, ignoring duplicates

tools.description: Check if an agent already exists for specific functionality

function.name: check_agent_exists
function.description: Use AI-powered matching to find existing agents that provide similar functionality

script_name.description: Name of the script to check

tools.description: Analyze a Python file to extract function information

function.name: analyze_python_file
function.description: Parse Python AST to extract function signatures, docstrings, and metadata

file_path.description: Path to the Python file to analyze
